name: cursor-gateway
description: Controlled gateway for running local coding agents (Linux/WSL) with an E2EE relay.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @cursor-gateway/shared && npm run build -w @cursor-gateway/e2ee && npm run build -w @cursor-gateway/server && npm run build -w @cursor-gateway/web && npm run build -w @cursor-gateway/browser-extension && npm run build -w @cursor-gateway/secure-web && npm run build -w @cursor-gateway/windows-runner && npm run build -w @cursor-gateway/secure-adapter
scripts.test: npm run test -w @cursor-gateway/shared && npm run test -w @cursor-gateway/e2ee && npm run test -w @cursor-gateway/server && npm run test -w @cursor-gateway/browser-extension && npm run test -w @cursor-gateway/secure-web && npm run test -w @cursor-gateway/web && npm run test -w @cursor-gateway/windows-runner && npm run test -w @cursor-gateway/secure-adapter
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @cursor-gateway/shared && npm run typecheck -w @cursor-gateway/e2ee && npm run typecheck -w @cursor-gateway/server && npm run typecheck -w @cursor-gateway/web && npm run typecheck -w @cursor-gateway/browser-extension && npm run typecheck -w @cursor-gateway/secure-web && npm run typecheck -w @cursor-gateway/windows-runner && npm run typecheck -w @cursor-gateway/secure-adapter
